name: adult large breed no corn, wheat, soy chicken & brown rice recipe dog food
description: hill's science diet large breed adult no corn, wheat, soy dry dog food is specially formulated to fuel the energy needs of large breed dogs during the prime of their life. made with high quality, easy to digest ingredients. natural sources of glucosamine & chondroitin for joint health balanced nutrition for holistic health including added taurine omega-6s & vitamin e for beautiful skin & coat high-quality protein for lean muscles
